mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, product_id, product_name, unit_price_amount, unit_price_currency, quantity FROM order_items WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_items ( id, order_id, product_id, product_name, unit_price_amount, unit_price_currency, quantity ) VALUES
(#{r.id}, #{r.orderId}, #{r.productId}, #{r.productName}, #{r.unitPriceAmount}, #{r.unitPriceCurrency}, #{r.quantity})
